cleavage agent: using 2 µg of sequencing grade trypsin (Promega) per fraction
collision energy: fragmentation by higher-energy C-trap dissociation (27% normalized collision energy)
enrichment method: loaded onto a TALON metal affinity column
fractionation method: layered on top of a sucrose density step gradient
instrument: coupled via a Nanospray Flex ion source (Thermo Fisher Scientific) to a Q Exactive Plus mass spectrometer
ionization type: coupled via a Nanospray Flex ion source (Thermo Fisher Scientific)
labeling: label-free quantification data were imported into Perseus
